creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #24)
> We have "blanket commits" for one of many reasons (including this)
> and documentation is public.

Of course you do. Your tasks would be nearly impossible w/o it.

My *only* argument is that affected MAINTAINERs should (must) be
included. Otherwise, what's the point of maintaining the port,
if not included in (proposed) changes to it?

How is this an unreasonable policy?

--Chris
